title: 1.1: States the primary text font families selected at startup as observed in verbose runtime diagnostics (e.g., regular, bold, italic, bold-italic variants with resolved font file paths)
1. 2: States the observed runtime fallback font resolution for at least one Arabic (RTL) codepoint based on debug output (e.g., showing a resolved Face object or reuse of a cached fallback index).
1.3:  States the observed runtime fallback or primary font resolution for at least one English (LTR) codepoint based on debug output.
1.4: States the runtime configuration value that confirms whether ligatures are enabled or disabled before any text rendering begins (e.g., the observed disable_ligatures setting).
1.5: States the runtime configuration value that confirms how bidirectional text direction is handled before rendering (e.g., whether RTL scripts are forced LTR or rendered naturally).
1.6:  States whether combining diacritics are rendered via composition or decomposition as reported in runtime shaping configuration.
1.7: States the observed cell metrics (like width, height) emitted during grid initialization from prerender or startup diagnostics.
1.8: States the observed baseline position within a cell as reported during prerender initialization.
1.9:  States the observed underline decoration position and thickness reported during prerender initialization.
1.10: States that overline decoration is not initialized or reported during startup diagnostics.
1.11: States the observed GPU texture atlas limits configured at startup (e.g., maximum texture size or layer count) before any glyph shaping occurs.

1.12: States that startup logs report the GPU texture atlas as ready/available to receive shaped glyph data (e.g., 'atlas initialized', 'texture layers allocated') before any text rendering pipeline operations begin.
1.13: States the observed initial page layout of the GPU texture atlas during startup (e.g., xnum × ynum grid configuration in sprite positions, or texture dimensions logged).
